use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH UNRESECTABLE OR METASTATIC MELANOMA WITH BRAFV600E MUTATION AS DETECTED BY AN FDA APPROVED TEST
ZELBORAF IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH ERDHEIM-CHESTER DISEASE WITH BRAF V600 MUTATION

indications.text:
1.1 Unresectable or Metastatic Melanoma
ZELBORAF® is indicated for the treatment of patients with unresectable or metastatic melanoma with
BRAF V600E mutation as detected by an FDA-approved test.
Limitation of Use: ZELBORAF is not indicated for treatment of patients with wild-type BRAF melanoma
[see...

ZELBORAF® is indicated for the treatment of patients with unresectable or metastatic melanoma with
BRAF V600E mutation as detected by an FDA-approved test.
Limitation of Use: ZELBORAF is not indicated for treatment of patients with wild-type BRAF melanoma
[see Warnings and Precautions (5.2)].
